v.CNV: 耶和华对摩西说：
v.ESV: The Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
v.GAE: 여호와께서 모세에게 말씀하여 이르시되
v.KJV: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,
v.NASB: Then the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
v.NIV: The Lord said to Moses,
v.NRSV: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
v.SAENEW: 주님께서 모세에게 이렇게 말씀하셨다.
v.WLB: 여호와께서 모세에게 말씀하셨습니다.

v.CNV: “你要在米甸人身上报以色列人的仇，然后要归到你本族那里去。”
v.ESV: “Avenge the people of Israel on the Midianites. Afterward you shall be gathered to your people.”
v.GAE: 이스라엘 자손의 원수를 미디안에게 갚으라 그 후에 네가 네 조상에게로 돌아가리라
v.KJV: Avenge the children of Israel of the Midianites: afterward shalt thou be gathered unto thy people.
v.NASB: 'Take full vengeance for the sons of Israel on the Midianites; afterward you will be gathered to your people.'
v.NIV: “Take vengeance on the Midianites for the Israelites. After that, you will be gathered to your people. ”
v.NRSV: “Avenge the Israelites on the Midianites; afterward you shall be gathered to your people.”
v.SAENEW: "너는 미디안 사람에게 이스라엘 자손의 원수를 갚아라. 그렇게 하고 난 다음에, 너는 조상에게로 돌아갈 것이다."
v.WLB: “이스라엘 자손들을 위해 미디안 사람들에게 복수하여라. 그 후에 너는 네 조상들에게 돌아갈 것이다.”

v.CNV: 摩西对人民说：“要从你们中间使一些人武装起来去作战，攻击米甸人，好在米甸人身上为耶和华报仇。
v.ESV: So Moses spoke to the people, saying, “Arm men from among you for the war, that they may go against Midian to execute the Lord 's vengeance on Midian.
v.GAE: 모세가 백성에게 말하여 이르되 너와 함께 있는 사람들 가운데서 전쟁에 나갈 사람들을 무장시키고 미디안을 치러 보내어 여호와의 원수를 갚되
v.KJV: And Moses spake unto the people, saying, Arm some of yourselves unto the war, and let them go against the Midianites, and avenge the LORD of Midian.
v.NASB: Moses spoke to the people, saying, 'Arm men from among you for the war, that they may go against Midian to execute the LORD'S vengeance on Midian.
v.NIV: So Moses said to the people, “Arm some of your men to go to war against the Midianites so that they may carry out the Lord ’s vengeance on them.
v.NRSV: So Moses said to the people, “Arm some of your number for the war, so that they may go against Midian, to execute the LORD’s vengeance on Midian.
v.SAENEW: 모세가 백성에게 말하였다. "당신들 가운데서 전쟁에 나갈 사람들을 무장시키시오. 미디안을 쳐서, 미디안에 대한 주님의 원수를 갚아야 하오.
v.WLB: 그러자 모세가 백성들에게 말했습니다. “너희 가운데 전투에 참가할 사람을 준비시키라. 그들로 하여금 미디안 사람들과 싸워 미디안에게 여호와의 복수를 행하게 하라.

v.CNV: 你们要从以色列众支派中每支派打发一千人去打仗。”
v.ESV: You shall send a thousand from each of the tribes of Israel to the war.”
v.GAE: 이스라엘 모든 지파에게 각 지파에서 천 명씩을 전쟁에 보낼지니라 하매
v.KJV: Of every tribe a thousand, throughout all the tribes of Israel, shall ye send to the war.
v.NASB: 'A thousand from each tribe of all the tribes of Israel you shall send to the war.'
v.NIV: Send into battle a thousand men from each of the tribes of Israel.”
v.NRSV: You shall send a thousand from each of the tribes of Israel to the war.”
v.SAENEW: 이스라엘 모든 지파는 각 지파마다, 어느 지파도 예외 없이, 천 명씩을 전쟁에 내보내야 하오."
v.WLB: 이스라엘의 각 지파에서 1,000명씩 싸우러 보낼 것이다.”

v.CNV: 于是从以色列千万人中，每支派选出一千人，共有一万二千人，都武装起来去打仗。
v.ESV: So there were provided, out of the thousands of Israel, a thousand from each tribe, twelve thousand armed for war.
v.GAE: 각 지파에서 천 명씩 이스라엘 백만 명 중에서 만 이천 명을 택하여 무장을 시킨지라
v.KJV: So there were delivered out of the thousands of Israel, a thousand of every tribe, twelve thousand armed for war.
v.NASB: So there were furnished from the thousands of Israel, a thousand from each tribe, twelve thousand armed for war.
v.NIV: So twelve thousand men armed for battle, a thousand from each tribe, were supplied from the clans of Israel.
v.NRSV: So out of the thousands of Israel, a thousand from each tribe were conscripted, twelve thousand armed for battle.
v.SAENEW: 그리하여 이스라엘 모든 족속에서 각 지파마다 천 명씩이 전쟁에 나가려고 무장을 하고 나섰는데, 그 수는 만 이천 명이었다.
v.WLB: 그리하여 각 지파마다 1,000명씩 해서 총 1만 2,000명의 무장한 군사들이 이스라엘 군대에서 파견됐습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西就打发每支派的一千人去打仗，并且派遣以利亚撒祭司的儿子非尼哈与他们一同去，非尼哈手里拿着圣所的器皿和吹大声的号筒。
v.ESV: And Moses sent them to the war, a thousand from each tribe, together with Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest, with the vessels of the sanctuary and the trumpets for the alarm in his hand.
v.GAE: 모세가 각 지파에 천 명씩 싸움에 보내되 제사장 엘르아살의 아들 비느하스에게 성소의 기구와 신호 나팔을 들려서 그들과 함께 전쟁에 보내매
v.KJV: And Moses sent them to the war, a thousand of every tribe, them and Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest, to the war, with the holy instruments, and the trumpets to blow in his hand.
v.NASB: Moses sent them, a thousand from each tribe, to the war, and Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest, to the war with them, and the holy vessels and the trumpets for the alarm in his hand.
v.NIV: Moses sent them into battle, a thousand from each tribe, along with Phinehas son of Eleazar, the priest, who took with him articles from the sanctuary and the trumpets for signaling.
v.NRSV: Moses sent them to the war, a thousand from each tribe, along with Phinehas son of Eleazar the priest, with the vessels of the sanctuary and the trumpets for sounding the alarm in his hand.
v.SAENEW: 모세는, 각 지파에서 천 명씩 뽑혀온 이들을 전쟁에 내보내면서, 제사장 엘르아살의 아들 비느하스에게 성소의 기구들과 신호용 나팔을 들려, 그들과 함께 전쟁에 나가게 하였다.
v.WLB: 이렇게 해서 모세는 각 지파마다 1,000명씩을 싸우러 보냈습니다. 또한 그들과 함께 제사장 엘르아살의 아들 비느하스를 거룩한 물건들과 신호용 나팔을 들려 함께 보냈습니다.

v.CNV: 他们就照着耶和华吩咐摩西的，去与米甸人作战，杀死了所有的男人。
v.ESV: They warred against Midian, as the Lord commanded Moses, and killed every male.
v.GAE: 그들이 여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 대로 미디안을 쳐서 남자를 다 죽였고
v.KJV: And they warred against the Midianites, as the LORD commanded Moses; and they slew all the males.
v.NASB: So they made war against Midian, just as the LORD had commanded Moses, and they killed every male.
v.NIV: They fought against Midian, as the Lord commanded Moses, and killed every man.
v.NRSV: They did battle against Midian, as the LORD had commanded Moses, and killed every male.
v.SAENEW: 그들은, 주님께서 모세에게 명하신 대로 미디안을 쳐서, 남자는 모조리 죽여 버렸다.
v.WLB: 그들은 여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 대로 미디안과 싸워서 그들의 모든 남자를 다 죽였습니다.

v.CNV: 在那些被杀的人以外，还杀了米甸的五个王，就是以未、利金、苏珥、户珥和利巴；又用刀杀了比珥的儿子巴兰。
v.ESV: They killed the kings of Midian with the rest of their slain, Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur, and Reba, the five kings of Midian. And they also killed Balaam the son of Beor with the sword.
v.GAE: 그 죽인 자 외에 미디안의 다섯 왕을 죽였으니 미디안의 왕들은 에위와 레겜과 수르와 후르와 레바이며 또 브올의 아들 발람을 칼로 죽였더라
v.KJV: And they slew the kings of Midian, beside the rest of them that were slain; namely, Evi, and Rekem, and Zur, and Hur, and Reba, five kings of Midian: Balaam also the son of Beor they slew with the sword.
v.NASB: They killed the kings of Midian along with the rest of their slain: Evi and Rekem and Zur and Hur and Reba, the five kings of Midian; they also killed Balaam the son of Beor with the sword.
v.NIV: Among their victims were Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur and Reba —the five kings of Midian. They also killed Balaam son of Beor with the sword.
v.NRSV: They killed the kings of Midian: Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur, and Reba, the five kings of Midian, in addition to others who were slain by them; and they also killed Balaam son of Beor with the sword.
v.SAENEW: 그들은 군인들만 죽였을 뿐 아니라, 미디안의 왕들도 죽였다. 에위와 레겜과 수르와 후르와 레바 등 미디안의 다섯 왕을 죽였고, 브올의 아들 발람도 칼로 쳐죽였다.
v.WLB: 죽임을 당한 사람들 가운데는 미디안의 다섯 왕들인 에위, 레겜, 수르, 후르, 레바도 있었습니다. 그들은 또한 브올의 아들 발람을 칼로 죽였습니다.

v.CNV: 以色列人掳了米甸人的妇女、孩子；又掳掠了他们所有的牲畜、羊群和财物；
v.ESV: And the people of Israel took captive the women of Midian and their little ones, and they took as plunder all their cattle, their flocks, and all their goods.
v.GAE: 이스라엘 자손이 미디안의 부녀들과 그들의 아이들을 사로잡고 그들의 가축과 양 떼와 재물을 다 탈취하고
v.KJV: And the children of Israel took all the women of Midian captives, and their little ones, and took the spoil of all their cattle, and all their flocks, and all their goods.
v.NASB: The sons of Israel captured the women of Midian and their little ones; and all their cattle and all their flocks and all their goods they plundered.
v.NIV: The Israelites captured the Midianite women and children and took all the Midianite herds, flocks and goods as plunder.
v.NRSV: The Israelites took the women of Midian and their little ones captive; and they took all their cattle, their flocks, and all their goods as booty.
v.SAENEW: 이스라엘 자손은 미디안 여인들과 그 아이들을 사로잡고 짐승과 가축 떼와 재산을 모두 약탈한 다음에,
v.WLB: 이스라엘 사람들은 미디안의 여자들과 아이들을 사로잡았으며 미디안의 소 떼와 양 떼와 물건들을 모두 전리품으로 빼앗았습니다.

v.CNV: 并用火烧了他们所住地方的一切城市和营寨；
v.ESV: All their cities in the places where they lived, and all their encampments, they burned with fire,
v.GAE: 그들이 거처하는 성읍들과 촌락을 다 불사르고
v.KJV: And they burnt all their cities wherein they dwelt, and all their goodly castles, with fire.
v.NASB: Then they burned all their cities where they lived and all their camps with fire.
v.NIV: They burned all the towns where the Midianites had settled, as well as all their camps.
v.NRSV: All their towns where they had settled, and all their encampments, they burned,
v.SAENEW: 그들이 살던 성읍과 촌락들은 다 불질렀고,
v.WLB: 그들은 미디안 사람들이 살고 있던 모든 성들을 불태웠고 그들의 모든 진영도 불태웠습니다.

v.CNV: 把一切夺来的和掳掠的，连人带牲畜都带走；
v.ESV: and took all the spoil and all the plunder, both of man and of beast.
v.GAE: 탈취한 것, 노략한 것, 사람과 짐승을 다 빼앗으니라
v.KJV: And they took all the spoil, and all the prey, both of men and of beasts.
v.NASB: They took all the spoil and all the prey, both of man and of beast.
v.NIV: They took all the plunder and spoils, including the people and animals,
v.NRSV: but they took all the spoil and all the booty, both people and animals.
v.SAENEW: 사람과 짐승은 다 노략질하여 모두 전리품으로 삼았다.
v.WLB: 그들은 사람들과 가축들을 비롯한 모든 약탈물과 노략물들을 취했습니다.

v.CNV: 他们把俘掳的人和掳来的，以及夺来的东西，都带到摩押平原，约旦河边，和耶利哥相对的营地那里，交给摩西和以利亚撒祭司，以及以色列的会众。
v.ESV: Then they brought the captives and the plunder and the spoil to Moses, and to Eleazar the priest, and to the congregation of the people of Israel, at the camp on the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.
v.GAE: 그들이 사로잡은 자와 노략한 것과 탈취한 것을 가지고 여리고 맞은편 요단 강 가 모압 평지의 진영에 이르러 모세와 제사장 엘르아살과 이스라엘 자손의 회중에게로 나아오니라
v.KJV: And they brought the captives, and the prey, and the spoil, unto Moses, and Eleazar the priest, and unto the congregation of the children of Israel, unto the camp at the plains of Moab, which are by Jordan near Jericho.
v.NASB: They brought the captives and the prey and the spoil to Moses, and to Eleazar the priest and to the congregation of the sons of Israel, to the camp at the plains of Moab, which are by the Jordan opposite Jericho.
v.NIV: and brought the captives, spoils and plunder to Moses and Eleazar the priest and the Israelite assembly at their camp on the plains of Moab, by the Jordan across from Jericho.
v.NRSV: Then they brought the captives and the booty and the spoil to Moses, to Eleazar the priest, and to the congregation of the Israelites, at the camp on the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.
v.SAENEW: 그들은 포로와 노략질한 전리품을 이끌고, 모세와 제사장 엘르아살과 이스라엘 자손의 회중이 있는 여리고 근처 요단 강 가 모압 평야의 진으로 왔다.
v.WLB: 그리고 요단 강 여리고 건너편 모압 평원의 진영에 있는 모세와 제사장 엘르아살과 모든 이스라엘 회중에게 포로들과 약탈물과 노략물을 가져갔습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西和以利亚撒祭司，以及会众所有的领袖，都出到营外迎接他们。
v.ESV: Moses and Eleazar the priest and all the chiefs of the congregation went to meet them outside the camp.
v.GAE: 모세와 제사장 엘르아살과 회중의 지도자들이 다 진영 밖에 나가서 영접하다가
v.KJV: And Moses, and Eleazar the priest, and all the princes of the congregation, went forth to meet them without the camp.
v.NASB: Moses and Eleazar the priest and all the leaders of the congregation went out to meet them outside the camp.
v.NIV: Moses, Eleazar the priest and all the leaders of the community went to meet them outside the camp.
v.NRSV: Moses, Eleazar the priest, and all the leaders of the congregation went to meet them outside the camp.
v.SAENEW: 모세와 제사장 엘르아살과 회중의 대표들이 모두 그들을 맞으러 진 밖으로 나갔다.
v.WLB: 모세와 제사장 엘르아살과 회중의 모든 지도자들이 그들을 맞으러 진영 밖으로 나갔습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西对作战回来的军官，就是对千夫长和百夫长发怒。
v.ESV: And Moses was angry with the officers of the army, the commanders of thousands and the commanders of hundreds, who had come from service in the war.
v.GAE: 모세가 군대의 지휘관 곧 싸움에서 돌아온 천부장들과 백부장들에게 노하니라
v.KJV: And Moses was wroth with the officers of the host, with the captains over thousands, and captains over hundreds, which came from the battle.
v.NASB: Moses was angry with the officers of the army, the captains of thousands and the captains of hundreds, who had come from service in the war.
v.NIV: Moses was angry with the officers of the army —the commanders of thousands and commanders of hundreds—who returned from the battle.
v.NRSV: Moses became angry with the officers of the army, the commanders of thousands and the commanders of hundreds, who had come from service in the war.
v.SAENEW: 그러나 모세는 전선에서 막 돌아오는, 군지휘관인 천부장들과 백부장들을 보고 화를 내었다.
v.WLB: 모세는 싸움터에서 돌아온 군대의 지휘관들, 곧 천부장들과 백부장들에게 화를 냈습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西对他们说：“你们让这些妇女存活吗？
v.ESV: Moses said to them, “Have you let all the women live?
v.GAE: 모세가 그들에게 이르되 너희가 여자들을 다 살려두었느냐
v.KJV: And Moses said unto them, Have ye saved all the women alive?
v.NASB: And Moses said to them, 'Have you spared all the women?
v.NIV: “Have you allowed all the women to live?” he asked them.
v.NRSV: Moses said to them, “Have you allowed all the women to live?
v.SAENEW: 모세가 그들을 꾸짖었다. "어쩌자고 여자들을 모두 살려 두었소?
v.WLB: 모세가 그들에게 물었습니다. “너희가 모든 여자들을 살려 두었구나?

v.CNV: 看哪，这些妇女因巴兰的计谋，使以色列人在毗珥的事上，得罪耶和华，以致瘟疫临到耶和华的会众身上。
v.ESV: Behold, these, on Balaam's advice, caused the people of Israel to act treacherously against the Lord in the incident of Peor, and so the plague came among the congregation of the Lord .
v.GAE: 보라 이들이 발람의 꾀를 따라 이스라엘 자손을 브올의 사건에서 여호와 앞에 범죄하게 하여 여호와의 회중 가운데에 염병이 일어나게 하였느니라
v.KJV: Behold, these caused the children of Israel, through the counsel of Balaam, to commit trespass against the LORD in the matter of Peor, and there was a plague among the congregation of the LORD.
v.NASB: 'Behold, these caused the sons of Israel, through the counsel of Balaam, to trespass against the LORD in the matter of Peor, so the plague was among the congregation of the LORD.
v.NIV: “They were the ones who followed Balaam’s advice and enticed the Israelites to be unfaithful to the Lord in the Peor incident, so that a plague struck the Lord ’s people.
v.NRSV: These women here, on Balaam’s advice, made the Israelites act treacherously against the LORD in the affair of Peor, so that the plague came among the congregation of the LORD.

v.KJV: Now therefore kill every male among the little ones, and kill every woman that hath known man by lying with him.

v.NRSV: But all the young girls who have not known a man by sleeping with him, keep alive for yourselves.

v.CNV: 你们也要洁净一切衣服、皮具、山羊毛织的物和木器。”
v.ESV: You shall purify every garment, every article of skin, all work of goats' hair, and every article of wood.”
v.GAE: 모든 의복과 가죽으로 만든 모든 것과 염소털로 만든 모든 것과 나무로 만든 모든 것을 다 깨끗하게 할지니라
v.KJV: And purify all your raiment, and all that is made of skins, and all work of goats’ hair, and all things made of wood.

v.NIV: Purify every garment as well as everything made of leather, goat hair or wood. ”

v.SAENEW: 그뿐만 아니라 모든 옷가지들, 모든 가죽제품들, 염소털로 짠 모든 것들, 나무로 만든 모든 것들도 부정탄 것을 벗겨야 하오."

v.CNV: 以利亚撒祭司对打仗回来的兵丁说：“这是耶和华吩咐摩西的律例：
v.ESV: Then Eleazar the priest said to the men in the army who had gone to battle: “This is the statute of the law that the Lord has commanded Moses:
v.GAE: 제사장 엘르아살이 싸움에 나갔던 군인들에게 이르되 이는 여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 율법이니라
v.KJV: And Eleazar the priest said unto the men of war which went to the battle, This is the ordinance of the law which the LORD commanded Moses;

v.WLB: 그러자 제사장 엘르아살이 싸움터에 갔다 온 군사들에게 말했습니다. “여호와께서 모세에게 명령하신 율법의 요구 사항은 이것이다.

v.CNV: 金、银、铜、铁、锡、铅，
v.ESV: only the gold, the silver, the bronze, the iron, the tin, and the lead,

v.NIV: and anything else that can withstand fire must be put through the fire, and then it will be clean. But it must also be purified with the water of cleansing. And whatever cannot withstand fire must be put through that water.
v.NRSV: everything that can withstand fire, shall be passed through fire, and it shall be clean. Nevertheless it shall also be purified with the water for purification; and whatever cannot withstand fire, shall be passed through the water.

v.NIV: On the seventh day wash your clothes and you will be clean. Then you may come into the camp. ”
v.NRSV: You must wash your clothes on the seventh day, and you shall be clean; afterward you may come into the camp.”

v.CNV: 耶和华对摩西说：
v.ESV: The Lord said to Moses,
v.GAE: 여호와께서 모세에게 말씀하여 이르시되

v.WLB: 여호와께서 모세에게 말씀하셨습니다.

v.NRSV: Divide the booty into two parts, between the warriors who went out to battle and all the congregation.
v.SAENEW: 너는 전리품으로 가져 온 것들을 반으로 나누어서, 반은 전쟁에 나갔다 온 군인들에게 주고, 반은 모든 회중에게 주어라.
v.WLB: 그리고 그 전리품을 전투에 참가했던 군사들과 나머지 회중에게 절반씩 나눠 주어라.

v.CNV: 你又要从出去打仗的人所得的，无论是人、牛、驴，或羊群之中，抽出五百分之一作贡物奉给耶和华；

v.NRSV: Take it from their half and give it to Eleazar the priest as an offering to the LORD.
v.SAENEW: 그들에게 나누어 준 절반에서 떼어 내어, 나 주에게 바치는 제물로 제사장 엘르아살에게 주어라.

v.GAE: 또 이스라엘 자손이 받은 절반에서는 사람이나 소나 나귀나 양 떼나 각종 짐승 오십분의 일을 가져다가 여호와의 성막을 맡은 레위인에게 주라

v.NIV: From the Israelites’ half, select one out of every fifty, whether people, cattle, donkeys, sheep or other animals. Give them to the Levites, who are responsible for the care of the Lord ’s tabernacle. ”

v.CNV: 于是，摩西和以利亚撒祭司照着耶和华吩咐摩西的行了。

v.KJV: And Moses and Eleazar the priest did as the LORD commanded Moses.

v.KJV: And all the gold of the offering that they offered up to the LORD, of the captains of thousands, and of the captains of hundreds, was sixteen thousand seven hundred and fifty shekels.
v.NASB: All the gold of the offering which they offered up to the LORD, from the captains of thousands and the captains of hundreds, was 16,750 shekels.
v.NIV: All the gold from the commanders of thousands and commanders of hundreds that Moses and Eleazar presented as a gift to the Lord weighed 16,750 shekels.
v.NRSV: And all the gold of the offering that they offered to the LORD, from the commanders of thousands and the commanders of hundreds, was sixteen thousand seven hundred fifty shekels.
v.SAENEW: 천부장들과 백부장들이 주님께 예물로 드린 금은 모두 만 육천칠백오십 세겔이나 되었다.
v.WLB: 그들이 천부장들과 백부장들로부터 여호와께 드리는 예물로 받은 금은 다해서 그 무게가 1만 6,750세겔이었습니다.

v.CNV: 士兵都各自夺取了财物。
v.ESV: (The men in the army had each taken plunder for himself.)
v.GAE: 군인들이 각기 자기를 위하여 탈취한 것이니라
v.KJV: ( For the men of war had taken spoil, every man for himself.)
v.NASB: The men of war had taken booty, every man for himself.
v.NIV: Each soldier had taken plunder for himself.
v.NRSV: (The troops had all taken plunder for themselves.)
v.SAENEW: 군인들은 저마다 사사로이 약탈한 전리품들도 가지고 있었다.
v.WLB: 전투에 참가한 사람들이 각자 빼앗은 것들이었습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西和以利亚撒祭司就从千夫长和百夫长手中收了金子，把它带进会幕里去，在耶和华面前作以色列人的记念。
v.ESV: And Moses and Eleazar the priest received the gold from the commanders of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it into the tent of meeting, as a memorial for the people of Israel before the Lord .
v.GAE: 모세와 제사장 엘르아살이 천부장과 백부장들에게서 금을 취하여 회막에 드려 여호와 앞에서 이스라엘 자손의 기념을 삼았더라
v.KJV: And Moses and Eleazar the priest took the gold of the captains of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it into the tabernacle of the congregation, for a memorial for the children of Israel before the LORD.
v.NASB: So Moses and Eleazar the priest took the gold from the captains of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it to the tent of meeting as a memorial for the sons of Israel before the LORD.
v.NIV: Moses and Eleazar the priest accepted the gold from the commanders of thousands and commanders of hundreds and brought it into the tent of meeting as a memorial for the Israelites before the Lord .
v.NRSV: So Moses and Eleazar the priest received the gold from the commanders of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it into the tent of meeting as a memorial for the Israelites before the LORD.
v.SAENEW: 모세와 제사장 엘르아살은, 천부장들과 백부장들에게서 금을 받아서, 회막으로 가져 가서 주님 앞에 놓고, 이스라엘 자손을 위한 기념물로 삼았다.
v.WLB: 모세와 제사장 엘르아살이 천부장들과 백부장들에게서 그 금을 받아 회막으로 가져 가서 여호와 앞에 놓아 이스라엘 자손들을 위한 기념물로 삼았습니다.
